title: My Dream Life
learningGoal: The learner will compose an English paragraph utilizing multiple descriptive adjectives in pre-nominal (Adjective + Noun) or predicative (Noun + is/are + Adjective) syntax, definitively confirming their avoidance of pluralized adjectives.
instructions: Write a paragraph describing your dream life! Talk about your dream house, your dream car, and your dogs. You MUST use at least 4 adjectives to describe things (like Big, Fast, Beautiful, Happy, Loud, Quiet). Remember: adjectives always stay singular, even if you have many dogs!

contentItems.text: CRITICAL RULE: DO NOT WRITE 'I have happys dogs'. Never put an 's' on the adjective. Just write 'happy dogs'.

writingPrompt: Write a short paragraph describing a dream house, a car, and your pets using at least 4 descriptive adjectives.
promptGoal: Test strict adherence to ADJ + NOUN ordering and the complete morphological neutrality of English adjectives regardless of gender or count.
referenceHints: I have two [Adjective] dogs. (No 's' on the adjective!)

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: I have a big house. My house is beautiful and quiet. I drive a fast car. I have three happy dogs. My life is very good.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: आई हैव अ बिग हाउस। माई हाउस इज़ ब्यूटीफुल एंड क्वाइट। आई ड्राइव अ फास्ट कार। आई हैव थ्री हैप्पी डॉग्स। माई लाइफ इज़ वेरी गुड।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: मेरे पास एक बड़ा घर है। मेरा घर सुंदर और शांत है। मैं एक तेज़ कार चलाता हूँ। मेरे तीन खुश कुत्ते हैं। मेरा जीवन बहुत अच्छा है।
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect score. The learner used 'big house', 'fast car', and 'happy dogs'. Adjectives preceded nouns and were never pluralized.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: My house is big. My car is fast. I have good dogs.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: माई हाउस इज़ बिग। माई कार इज़ फास्ट। आई हैव गुड डॉग्स।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: मेरा घर बड़ा है। मेरी कार तेज़ है। मेरे पास अच्छे कुत्ते हैं।
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Acceptable. While the vocabulary is simpler, the grammar is flawless. 'Good dogs' successfully avoids the 'Goods dogs' mistake.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user place the descriptive word BEFORE the noun or after the 'is' verb? (e.g., 'A fast car' vs 'A car fast').
Did the user incorrectly append an 's' to any descriptive words? (e.g., scoring penalties for 'Bads dogs' or 'Fasts cars').
Did the user fulfill the basic volume requirement and utilize at least a few descriptive terms?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: I have a big house. The house is beautiful. I have a fast red car. I also have two small dogs. They are happy.
acceptableAlternates: My dream house is big and clean. I drive a fast car. I have happy dogs.
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Must include at least two adjectives modifying nouns. Zero instances of pluralized adjectives.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You successfully placed all English adjectives BEFORE their nouns, and you flawlessly avoided making the adjectives plural.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please review your writing. Did you write 'I have a car fast'? That is wrong. It must be 'I have a FAST CAR'. The description ALWAYS comes first.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good start! You placed the words in the right order. However, make sure you never put an 'S' on a description. 'Happys dogs' is incorrect. It is just 'Happy dogs'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Write about your dream house and car. Remember, descriptions come first and have no plurals.

hintText: You can describe something in two ways. 'I have a big house.' OR 'My house is big.' Both ways are perfect!
